app.title: LoRA Speedrun – a public wall-clock leaderboard for fine-tuning techniques
app.author: Vineeth147
app.description: A public leaderboard for LoRA fine-tuning
proposed_tests: Install LoRA Speedrun and add a model
Run a fine-tuning job and measure wall-clock time
Check leaderboard rankings and compare to baseline
Benchmark performance with different models and settings
